s: In 1978, Dave Rajsich suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.050, WHIP 1.650, SO 9, WAR 0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYY -> TEX).
In 1979, Dave Rajsich suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.520, WHIP 1.380, SO 32, WAR 0.200. Notable context: Joined TEX.
